## Scene 3

**Setting: Streets of the South Bronx - Tony runs home**

**Tony's Movement (Close Details):**
- Running feet slapping pavement 
- A little boy's hands caresses street art as he runs by
- Tony sees with his hands, he sees with his feet, he sees from within

**Environment (Macro View):**
- A classic summer day in the south Bronx: 
- Boom boxes booming beats 
- Street musicians set up and play 
- Food vendors, shaved ice, pretzels, hot dogs 
- Ladies screaming to each other through open windows

**The Near Miss:**
- Tony is only focused on finding Monk. His eyes go side to side 
- So he doesn't see what is right in front of him: a moving Cab 
- Which almost hits Tony

**Sensory Overload:**
- The screech of the near miss sets Tony's mind off. He loses control and is overwhelmed with:
- Single frame images. A cacophony that consumes the frame. Like the Birds and then the students at school
- Tony sees everything at once and it overwhelms him

**Recovery & Camera Movement:**
- So he freezes. His face emotes as we push into a close up. He resets. And takes off running
- The camera pulls up and back until it is over the neighborhood
- Tony runs out of frame

## Scene 4

**Setting: Grandma's apartment**

**Environment Details:**
- Old tenement. She lived there forever
- Worn and textured
- Paintings hung on the walls and painted on the walls
- Collections
- Folk artsy
- A place for adult children
- A place out of time
- Old photos of Baby Tony and Little Boy Monk and younger immigrant Grandma
- Lots of books and collages
- It's not neat but it's not messy
- It's busy in there

**Monk's Art Studio:**
- Monk has pushed everything aside and had created an art studio in the living room
- He dances as he paints
- He dances so he can paint
- He can't paint without moving

**Action Sequence:**
- The camera, having started in close up on Tony on the street now flies in through the window and turns with monk as he turns revealing the front door
- Tony runs in
- Monk is ecstatic
- They both do the paint dance. It's messy
- Loaded Paint Brushes tromboning in and out
- Paint going where it wants to. Everywhere
- They are alive
- They are free
